case_title: ELISABETH MARAGOULA VS. AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,389.73 FILED BY MARAGOULA, ELISABETH AS TO DEFENDANT AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2018 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY MARAGOULA, ELISABETH AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARAGOULA, ELISABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX $2,389.73 PRINCIPAL, $119.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,509.23, DEFENDANT BREACHED THE CONTRACT BY FAILING TO PROVIDE A QUALIFIED & TRAINED AU PAIR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $69.50 SERVED JUN-06-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AU PAIR CARE BY INTRAX

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 16, 2018. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, AFTER MATTER WAS HEARD, THE COURT TAKEN THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JULY 16, 2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. BOTH PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
